title: Sweet vs Salty vs Sour
description: Discover whether your tastes lean sweet, salty, or sour.

questions.text: When I'm hungry, I naturally go grab a jar of pickles.
My ideal movie snack is buttery popcorn with extra salt.
My Tim Hortons coffee order usually includes extra sugar.
I enjoy sour candies more than chocolate bars.
I would choose fries over cake almost every time.
Dessert is usually my favorite part of the meal.

categories.name: Sweet
categories.description: You enjoy comforting, rich, sugary flavors and tend toward treats and desserts.

categories.name: Salty
categories.description: You gravitate toward savory, salty snacks and bold comfort foods.

categories.name: Sour
categories.description: You enjoy sharp, tangy, acidic flavors and adventurous snacks.
